embeds.title: About Exton Client Pass
embeds.description: With the Client Pass, you can access exclusive features right from our Discord. Get special perks and stay ahead in the Web3 game. Whether you're here for personal safety or just want an edge in the space, the Client Pass has you covered.

embeds.title: Tiers
embeds.description:
:warning: *Repeated checks don't count. For more details, see our [docs](https://exton-scam-tracker.gitbook.io/docs) to review our terms and services.*

:warning: *Also, spots are limited to maintain optimal server performance and ensure dedicated support for all users*

fields.name: Client Lite (Base: $10.00/mo | **15% off** → $8.50/mo on the 3-month plan! :tada: Total $25.50)
fields.value:
:white_check_mark: 3 reused username history checks
:white_check_mark: Special Client Lite role
:white_check_mark: Automated raffle entries via AlphaBot (Limit: 1 account)

:hourglass_flowing_sand: Only 19 spots available

fields.name: Client Pro (Base: $11.99/mo | **15% off** → $10.19/mo on the 3-month plan! :tada: Total $30.57)
fields.value:
:white_check_mark: Unlimited reused username history checks (via DM or Exton official Discord)
:white_check_mark: Twitter Monitor with no limits (Beta)
:white_check_mark: Access to exclusive collections and VIP giveaways on Rego Raffles
:white_check_mark: Special Client Pro role
:white_check_mark: Automated raffle entries via AlphaBot (Limit: 5 accounts)

:hourglass_flowing_sand: Only 19 spots available
